title: Italian-Style Shrimp Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Italian-inspired dish featuring shrimp, delicate onions, and a Kenyan touch. Perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: shrimp
ingredients.amount: 1 pound large shrimp, peeled and deveined

ingredients.name: skewers
ingredients.amount: 10-12 bamboo skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: 2. Thread 3-4 shrimp, an onion slice, and a sprinkle of Kenyan chili flakes onto each skewer.
3. Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
5. During the last 2 minutes of cooking, brush the skewers with lemon juice.
6. Remove the skewers from the grill and serve immediately.
7. Garnish with additional lemon wedges, if desired.
